/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O3 -flto -shared  -o /home/name/unitree_actuator_sdk/lib/unitree_actuator_sdk.cpython-312-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/unitree_actuator_sdk.dir/thirdparty/python_wrapper/wrapper.cpp.o   -L/home/name/unitree_actuator_sdk/TunnelingCartCode/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/name/unitree_actuator_sdk/TunnelingCartCode/lib -lUnitreeMotorSDK_Arm64
